sql_array: CREATE TABLE sales (id INTEGER, sale_date TIMESTAMP, amount NUMERIC);
CREATE TABLE products (product_id INTEGER, product_name VARCHAR, price NUMERIC);
INSERT INTO products VALUES (1, 'Product A', 50.00), (2, 'Product B', 75.00), (3, 'Product C', NULL);
CREATE TABLE sales_summary AS SELECT sale_date, COUNT(*) AS total_sales, SUM(amount) AS total_amount FROM sales GROUP BY sale_date;

SELECT s.sale_date, regr_intercept(s.total_amount, p.price + INTERVAL '1 DAY') AS intercept_value FROM (SELECT sale_date, SUM(amount) AS total_amount FROM sales GROUP BY sale_date) AS s JOIN products p ON p.price IS NOT NULL ORDER BY s.sale_date;

SELECT regr_intercept(s.total_amount, p.price) + INTERVAL 5 DAY AS adjusted_intercept FROM (SELECT sale_date, SUM(amount) AS total_amount FROM sales GROUP BY sale_date) AS s JOIN products p ON s.total_amount IS NOT NULL AND p.price IS NOT NULL HAVING adjusted_intercept > 100;

SELECT s.sale_date, regr_intercept(s.total_amount, COALESCE(p.price, 0)) AS intercept_with_coalesce FROM (SELECT sale_date, SUM(amount) AS total_amount FROM sales GROUP BY sale_date) AS s JOIN products p ON p.product_id IN (SELECT product_id FROM products WHERE price IS NULL) ORDER BY s.sale_date;
SELECT sale_date, regr_intercept(AVG(amount), AVG(COALESCE(price, 0))) + INTERVAL 10 DAY AS final_intercept FROM sales JOIN products ON TRUE GROUP BY sale_date;
